fields.helpText: This is a code which is used in DRG Grouper processing. It specifies a particular patient condition which further explains a diagnosis.

This multiple contains blocks of specific combinations of procedures  (located in the "ONE OF" and the "WITH ONE OF n" multiples), which when  found to occur together for a patient, confirm that the patient has the  specific patient case identified in the IDENTIFIER CODE (#.01) field. It  also supplies the DRGs (located in the "MDC" multiple) associated with  patient case.   Patient cases are divided in such a way that any one BLOCK has to be  satisfied.
